zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Anstye於大約1551年在英國諾福爾可受洗時，她的父親Walter Anstye27歲，母親Alice Fullman28歲。她於大約1569年與William Fiske在英國素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 詹姆斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1600年2月13日在英國素福爾可享年50歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 詹姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Anstye于大约1551年在英国諾福爾可受洗时，她的父亲Walter Anstye27岁，母亲Alice Fullman28岁。她于大约1569年与William Fiske在英国素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 詹姆斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1600年2月13日在英国素福爾可享年50岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 詹姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Anstye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name for one who lived by a path, from any of the dozen places in England called Anstey or Ansty, from Old English ānstiga, a compound of ān ‘one’ + stīg ‘path’, denoting a narrow path. This surname is found principally in southern England and the West Country.

variants.name: Hancey
meanings: English (Suffolk): perhaps a local pronunciation of   Anstey  . This name is now more common in the US than in England.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Anstye was christened about 1551, in Norfolk, England, her father, Walter Anstye, was 27 and her mother, Alice Fullman, was 28. She married William Fiske about 1569, in South Elmham St James, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 13 February 1600, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in South Elmham St James, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Anstye a été baptisée environ 1551, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Walter Anstye, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice Fullman, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William Fiske environ 1569, à South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 février 1600, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Anstyeが約1551年にイギリスノーフォルクで洗礼を受けた時，父Walter Anstyeは27歳，母Alice Fullmanは28歳であった。約1569年にイギリススフォルクソウス エルムハム スト ジャムスでWilliam Fiskeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1600年2月13日にイギリススフォルクで50歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクソウス エルムハム スト ジャムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Anstye(이)가 대략 1551년 영국 노르폴크에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Anstye(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Fullman(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1569년 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 자메스에서 William Fiske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1600년 2월 13일 영국 수폴크에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 자메스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Anstye foi batizada aproximadamente 1551, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Anstye, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice Fullman, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com William Fiske aproximadamente 1569, em South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1600, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Anstye была крещена около 1551 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Anstye было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Fullman, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Fiske около 1569 г. в местности соут элмхам ст джемесь, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 13 февраля 1600 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности соут элмхам ст джемесь, суффолк, Англия.
